Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for Administrator. Bid is increased to $504,500.00. Additional bond is not required. Counsel will prepare the order. Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (60 Castillo St., San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Continued To Dec-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for administrator. Counsel filed an inventory this morning. She is requesting a continuance to correct publication problem. Matter is continued to 12/4. Court is granting an Order Shortening Time for Publication. Counsel to prepare an order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Lillian Ng appearing for petitioner. Counsel has spoken with an attorney in Tennesse to see what can be done there. Matter granted. Bond is fixed at the amount of $500,000.00. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
